message:
Front legs down, butt in the air, tail going a mile a minute — the famous "play bow." 🐶🙇 It's one of the clearest things your dog can say, and it means: "This is all in fun — let's play!" Dogs use it to kick off a game and to promise that any wrestling or chasing that follows is friendly, not a fight. It's basically a furry little peace treaty right before the zoomies begin. So sweet, and honestly so polite. 🐾

Tag a friend whose dog play-bows to start every game! 🎾
